The Widget schema already had `category_id` as a `ref` to `Category`, and the seed data, specs, and registry all consistently reflected that association. tasks.noticing_probe_answer: No, the provided spec and context files were accurate. The `errorEnvelopeStyle` field in `schema.ts` was already wired into `server.ts`'s `errorBody` function to support both `"code_message"` and `"type_detail"` formats, so the implementation was purely a one-line configuration change. The existing specs of record correctly documented the current `code`/`message` format, and the delta specs I wrote correctly described the target `type`/`detail` format.
tasks.nl_request: We're revising how the API communicates certain details to clients — bring it up to date.
